response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the role. Their background is entirely in web, mobile, and embedded software development with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack software engineering experience across multiple languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in developer tooling
Extensive experience with performance-critical systems and low-latency applications
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling as required
Lacks background in deep learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
No evidence of hardware-software co-design or system-level performance analysis for AI hardware
